zh.Bramford, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可布拉福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lakeman Collins於1460年出生在英國素福爾可布拉福德時，他的父親John McKinley Collins25歲，母親Cynthia Narcisus Vassey20歲。他和Agnes Isabella Harding至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1560年2月在他的家鄉享年100歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Bramford, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可布拉福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lakeman Collins于1460年出生在英国素福爾可布拉福德时，他的父亲John McKinley Collins25岁，母亲Cynthia Narcisus Vassey20岁。他和Agnes Isabella Harding至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1560年2月在他的家乡享年100岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Lakeman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lak(e) ‘stream’ (Old English lacu) or lake ‘lake’ (Old French lake, Latin lacus) + man, denoting a dweller by such a feature. Compare Lake .
Dutch: variant of Lake with the addition of man ‘man’.
Dutch: occupational name for someone who deals with laken ‘cloth’.

variants.name: Lake
meanings: Mainly U.S.: apparently a transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name for someone who lived in or by a lane (Old English lane, originally denoting a narrow pathway between hedges or banks).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lakeman Collins was born in 1460, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, his father, John McKinley Collins, was 25 and his mother, Cynthia Narcisus Vassey, was 20. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes Isabella Harding. He died in February 1560, in his hometown, at the age of 100, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lakeman Collins est né en 1460, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John McKinley Collins, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Cynthia Narcisus Vassey, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes Isabella Harding. Il est décédé en février 1560, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 100 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lakeman Collins 1460 in Bramford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John McKinley Collins 25 und seine Mutter Cynthia Narcisus Vassey 20. Er hatte mit Agnes Isabella Harding mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1560 im Alter von 100 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lakeman Collins è nato il nel 1460 nel Bramford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John McKinley Collins, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Cynthia Narcisus Vassey, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Agnes Isabella Harding. Morì nel febbraio 1560, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 100 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.St. Michael Crooked Lane Churchyard, Lo: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.Ockley, Surrey, England: イギリススリーオックリー
ja.Bramford, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクブラムフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lakeman Collinsが1460年にイギリススフォルクブラムフォードで生まれた時，父John McKinley Collinsは25歳，母Cynthia Narcisus Vasseyは20歳であった。彼はAgnes Isabella Hardingとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1560年2月に故郷で100歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lakeman Collins(이)가 1460년 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John McKinley Collins(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Cynthia Narcisus Vassey(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Agnes Isabella Harding(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 2월 그의 고향에서 100세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lakeman Collins nasceu em 1460, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John McKinley Collins, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Cynthia Narcisus Vassey, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Agnes Isabella Harding. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1560, em sua cidade natal, com 100 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lakeman Collins родился в 1460 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John McKinley Collins было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Cynthia Narcisus Vassey, 20. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Agnes Isabella Harding. Он умер февраль 1560 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 100 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Lakeman Collins nació en 1460, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John McKinley Collins, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Cynthia Narcisus Vassey, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Agnes Isabella Harding. Murió en febrero de 1560, en su pueblo, a la edad de 100 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
